outcome: Promote one small public T1-target authority, carried by three case archives, for the frozen experimental profile.
Cover the three required positive DS-0 cases, compact negative mutations, exact identity vectors, and an independent full-array read report.
Replace the WP-06 false-only target-format fixture guard only when every authority component is complete and digest-bound.
invariants: Fixture-byte producer, scientific fact oracle, and independent reader are separate implementation lineages and import no Mirante production code.
The producer treats oracle identities as opaque inputs and does not compute the logical digests or statistics that certify its bytes.

The corpus uses one deterministic archive per positive package, not exploded committed package trees, and every archive plus the combined corpus remains inside the D-023 file, directory, depth, fan-out, path, size, and compression ceilings.

The three positive cases cover 2D uint8 sparse data across multiple outer shards, 3D uint16 3t x 2c anisotropic non-divisible multiscale data, and 3D finite-float32 1t x 4c validity and bit-edge data.
Promotion changes only evidence authority; no product reader, writer, importer, runtime, renderer, UI, or persisted lifecycle authority changes.
The format remains EXPERIMENTAL and no compatibility or fallback path is added.
forbidden_paths: all product reader, writer, importer, runtime, renderer, and UI paths

authority_flip.new: fixtures/target/manifest.json, its archive, expected facts, identity vectors, mutations, independent-reader report, and matching T1-target registry promotion
authority_flip.deleted: the WP-06 rule that target_format_t1_available must always be false
authority_flip.contract_replacement: replace the diagnostic external_reader_probe contract binding with the promoted target-corpus binding; the diagnostic files may remain non-authoritative support evidence
authority_flip.affirmative_guard: target_format_t1_available is true if and only if exactly one complete promoted T1-target authority validates
unchanged: production consumption and package conformance remain WP-10A-D work
no CANDIDATE, stable-format, product-support, or generic OME-Zarr claim

positive_cases.required_edges: valid zeros dominate, nonzero signal crosses both x outer shards and all ten logical bricks, implicit validity, IO-2-eligible diagonal geometry
anisotropy, regular time, nonzero scale and translation, nondivisible boundaries, channel ordering, implicit validity, IO-2 eligibility

signed zeros, signed subnormal and finite normal extrema, rounding boundaries, mixed and all-invalid regions, explicit validity, physical-channel permutation, arbitrary affine geometry, IO-1 classification

corpus.mutation_boundary: recipes only; mutations are derived into ignored temporary directories and are not duplicated in the archive
corpus.identity_boundary: independent scientific, object, package, recipe, derivation-record, release, and artifact vectors plus the required equal-science and one-bit metamorphic pairs
corpus.candidate_boundary: generation writes only beneath target/mirante4d/fixture-candidates; the reviewed promotion checkpoint alone writes tracked authority files
implementation_checkpoints: C2: declarative cases, zero-dependency oracle, and hand identity vectors without archives or promotion
C3: independent producer, three deterministic case archives, inventory facts, and mutation recipes without promotion
C4: independent reader and schema report, mutation execution, two-run reproduction, and one atomic manifest and registry promotion

non_goals: Changing the frozen profile, codecs, control schemas, identity algorithms, or package writer
Making Mirante production code consume or pass the promoted authority; WP-10A-D owns that separate checkpoint
Importer or source-TIFF conformance, multiscale-generation acceptance, or public microscopy-data release
IO-3, CANDIDATE, stable-format, product-open, performance, GPU, or large-dataset claims
A generic OME-Zarr reader or support for codecs, stores, labels, tables, plates, or remote layouts outside the frozen subset
stop_conditions: Any lineage imports, invokes, copies, or regenerates from Mirante production format, storage, identity, canonicalization, transform, statistics, or codec code, or copies another lineage's implementation.
The external reader cannot read all three exact positive packages through the selected Zarr-v3 shard and codec subset.
Official pinned OME schema validation or the prose dimension-name rule fails.
Two clean reproductions differ in archive, expected-fact, identity-vector, mutation, or reader-report bytes.
The archive or extraction would exceed a D-023 ceiling or require an unsafe path, link, device, collision, or overwrite.
A complete reviewed promotion cannot be made atomically; leave target_format_t1_available false.
Promotion is attempted in the same invocation that generates the candidate authority.
The work requires any production or product change, lifecycle promotion, compatibility path, or broader interoperability claim.

acceptance: The archive validates offline against its exact manifest, inventory, limits, and digests and extracts only into a fresh caller-owned directory.
All three lineage source and lock digests are distinct and bound by the promotion manifest.
Two clean reproductions yield identical tracked authority bytes.
The independent reader reports exact shapes, dtypes, values, validity, axes, transforms, shard geometry, package IDs, and official-schema results for all three cases.
The fact oracle supplies the required logical digests, statistics, scientific identities, exact identity vectors, and metamorphic expectations.
A separate reviewed promotion manifest binds the exact candidate digests and owner/scientific approval before tracked authority files change.
The registry flag and T1-target promotion become true together and fail closed if any authority component changes.
Both repository verification groups pass on the clean committed revision.
evidence.product_open: not applicable because this off-product evidence slice changes no reachable viewer, loading, interaction, rendering, or large-dataset path

rollback.unit: each pre-promotion C2/C3 checkpoint is independently revertible; C4 promotion is one atomic rollback unit
rollback.action: delete ignored candidates or revert their pre-promotion checkpoint; if C4 was promoted, revert its tracked authority and affirmative registry flip together
rollback.product_rollback: none because no product authority flips
